title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Quintessentially Wine Limited
body: "Application number 5394  Applicant Quintessentially (UK) Limited and Q Worldwide Limited objected to the name used by Quintessentially Wine Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 14 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Quintessentially Wine Limited is changed to 05526776, Ltd. "
